shakshi: Zukoru entered the player's dreams the moment Othieru fell — he wasted no time
The deaths of millions threatened, the Great Obscenity of Game 1 echoed — Zukoru uses what he knows as a weapon
The player may not have the context for what Zukoru's taunting references but the weight is present — the games cost something
The dream sent the player to the Sloth Ring — that is where Zukoru is and where this ends
The player returned to the ring cleared in 0035 — Zukoru has made it his
Zukoru confronted — the originating demon of betrayal, alone, in the Sloth Ring. No alliance comes with the player.
Zukoru killed — the dream invasion ended, Kielum's network diminished further
Both Othieru and Zukoru down — the network significantly weakened before the final conflict with Kielum himself
The originating demon of betrayal — everything betrayed across the game is in that room with the player even if neither names it
